svg.title: Tongue Twister Mage Arena — Game Workflow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full game loop from match start to spell cast, pronunciation scoring, and outcome resolution

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does AI generate the spells at match start?')
sendPrompt('What information is shown during the spell reveal phase?')
sendPrompt('Give an example of an easy tongue-twister spell name')
sendPrompt('Give an example of a medium difficulty tongue-twister spell in another language')
sendPrompt('Give an example of a very hard tongue-twister spell name from multiple languages')
sendPrompt('How does the voice recording work during casting?')
sendPrompt('How does the pronunciation scoring algorithm work?')
g.text: Fuzzy match transcript vs phonetic guide

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens on a perfect pronunciation hit?')
sendPrompt('How does the backfire mechanic work?')
sendPrompt('How is HP tracked across turns?')
sendPrompt('What happens at the end of the game?')
